zh.lifeSummary: Hugues II de Payens 1st Grand Master of the Knights Templar是Hugues de Payens , Lord of Montigny和second wife of Hugues de Payens的兒子，於1070年2月9日出生在法國o-阿爾培斯阿爾艾安農亞。他於1108年與Elizabeth de Chappes在法國哈帕格結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1136年5月24日在以色列מחוז ירושליםיְרוּשָׁלַיִם享年66歲，埋葬在巴勒斯坦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hugues II de Payens 1st Grand Master of the Knights Templar是Hugues de Payens , Lord of Montigny和second wife of Hugues de Payens的儿子，于1070年2月9日出生在法国o-阿爾培斯阿爾艾安農亞。他于1108年与Elizabeth de Chappes在法国哈帕格结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1136年5月24日在以色列מחוז ירושליםיְרוּשָׁלַיִם享年66岁，埋葬在巴勒斯坦。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Payens
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Payne , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Payne
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Pai(e)n, Pagen (from Latin Paganus), a fairly common personal name among Normans. It derived from a word that originally meant ‘villager, rustic’, later ‘heathen’, but it had doubtless lost these connotations in its use as a late medieval personal name. This name has also been established in Ireland since the 14th century.

History: Thomas Payne, who was a freeman of Plymouth Colony in 1639, was the founder of a large American family, which included Robert Treat Paine (1731–1814), one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence. See also   Paine  .

nameMeanings.name: Hugues
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hugues Capet ( ?938–96 ) was ruler of France ( 987–96 ) and founder of the Capetian dynasty. See Hugh .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: Hugues II de Payens 1st Grand Master of the Knights Templar was born on 9 February 1070, in Annonay, Ardèche, Rhône-Alpes, France as the son of Hugues de Payens , Lord of Montigny and second wife of Hugues de Payens. He married Elizabeth de Chappes in 1108, in Champagne, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 24 May 1136, in Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel, at the age of 66, and was buried in Palestine.

fr.lifeSummary: Hugues II de Payens 1st Grand Master of the Knights Templar est né le 9 février 1070, à Annonay, Ardèche, Rhône-Alpes, France, fils de Hugues de Payens , Lord of Montigny et second wife of Hugues de Payens. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Chappes en 1108, à Champagne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 24 mai 1136, à Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israël, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Palestine.

de.lifeSummary: Hugues II de Payens 1st Grand Master of the Knights Templar wurde am 9. Februar 1070 in Annonay, Ardèche, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich, als Sohn von Hugues de Payens , Lord of Montigny und second wife of Hugues de Payens geboren. Er hat 1108 in Champagne, Frankreich Elizabeth de Chappes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 24. Mai 1136 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel und wurde in Palästina begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Hugues II de Payens 1st Grand Master of the Knights Templar è nato il il 9 febbraio 1070 nel Annonay, Ardèche, Rhône-Alpes, Francia come figlio di Hugues de Payens , Lord of Montigny e second wife of Hugues de Payens. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Chappes nel 1108, nel Champagne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 24 maggio 1136, nel Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israele, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Palestina.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugues II de Payens 1st Grand Master of the Knights Templarは1070年2月9日にフランスルhoネ-アルペスアルドeチェアノナイでHugues de Payens , Lord of Montignyとsecond wife of Hugues de Payensの息子として生まれた。1108年にフランスチャンプアグンでElizabeth de Chappesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1136年5月24日にイスラエルמחוז ירושליםיְרוּשָׁלַיִםで66歳で死去し，パレスチナにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugues II de Payens 1st Grand Master of the Knights Templar(은)는 1070년 2월 9일 프랑스 ho니-알프스 아드e체 아넌아이에서 Hugues de Payens , Lord of Montigny(와)과 second wife of Hugues de Payens의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1108년 프랑스 챔파그니에서 Elizabeth de Chappes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1136년 5월 24일 이스라엘 מחוז ירושלים יְרוּשָׁלַיִם에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 팔레스타인에 묻혔다.

mn.9 February 1070–24 May 1136: 1070 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 9–1136 оны Тавдугаар сарын 24

pt.9 February 1070–24 May 1136: 9 de fevereiro de 1070–24 de maio de 1136
pt.lifeSummary: Hugues II de Payens 1st Grand Master of the Knights Templar nasceu em 9 de fevereiro de 1070, em Annonay, Ardèche, Rhône-Alpes, França filho de Hugues de Payens , Lord of Montigny e second wife of Hugues de Payens. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Chappes em 1108, em Champagne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 24 de maio de 1136, em Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Palestina.

ru.lifeSummary: Hugues II de Payens 1st Grand Master of the Knights Templar родился 9 февраля 1070 г. в местности аннонеи, ардeч, рoне-алпесь, Франция. Его родителей звали Hugues de Payens , Lord of Montigny и second wife of Hugues de Payens. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Chappes в 1108 г. в местности чампагн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 24 мая 1136 г. в местности יְרוּשָׁלַיִם, מחוז ירושלים, Израиль в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности Палестина.

es.9 February 1070–24 May 1136: 9 de febrero de 1070–24 de mayo de 1136
es.lifeSummary: Hugues II de Payens 1st Grand Master of the Knights Templar nació el 9 de febrero de 1070, en Annonay, Ardèche, Rhône-Alpes, Francia como hijo de Hugues de Payens , Lord of Montigny y second wife of Hugues de Payens. Se casó con Elizabeth de Chappes en 1108, en Champagne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 24 de mayo de 1136, en Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Palestina.
